application.name: Ambient AI Scribe
application.description: Medical transcription and summarization system using LLM inference

mitigation_measures: Human-in-the-loop review of all generated summaries before clinical use
Automated hallucination detection via faithfulness scoring
Input validation and PII detection before LLM processing

manual_review.review_notes: Risk classification as high-risk (Annex III, Nr. 5a) confirmed. Classification reasoning is substantive and complete. Mitigation measures are appropriate for healthcare context.

affected_rights: Protection of personal data (Art. 8 EU Charter)

oversight_roles.responsibility: Reviews AI-generated summaries before clinical documentation
oversight_roles.authority: Can reject, modify, or approve AI output

oversight_roles.responsibility: Monitors system performance, drift alerts, and compliance metrics
oversight_roles.authority: Can suspend system operation via kill-switch

escalation_procedure.level_1: Medical Reviewer flags issue in application
escalation_procedure.level_2: AI Governance Lead reviews flagged cases within 24h
escalation_procedure.level_3: Chief Medical Officer decides on system suspension

transparency.user_notification: System clearly indicates AI-generated content with visual markers

data_governance.retention_policy: 7 years per medical record retention requirements
data_governance.gdpr_lawful_basis: Art. 9 Abs. 2 lit. h GDPR — healthcare provision

approval.approval_rationale: FRIA reviewed and confirmed. Human oversight model (HITL) appropriate for high-risk healthcare system. Kill-switch tested and operational. Conformity assessment declaration verified against Art. 47.
